title: Sky City
narrative: Build a city skyline! Place buildings of different heights so the view from each side matches the clues. Taller buildings block shorter ones behind them.

levels.name: Tiny Town
levels.hint: A clue of 1 means the tallest building is right at the edge. Start there!

levels.name: Small City
levels.hint: A clue of 5 on a 5×5 grid means buildings go 1,2,3,4,5 in ascending order from that edge.

levels.name: Growing Up
levels.hint: Use the 5-clue and 3-clue together to narrow down possibilities.

levels.name: Metropolis
levels.hint: 6×6 — start with the biggest clues. A 6-clue means ascending, a 4-clue on the bottom means the column reads 4 visible from below.
